COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN, MBALDOCCHI, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. 2:19 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLTF. B. THAKOR AND DEFT ROSE JOHNSON PRESENT AND BOTH APPEARING IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: NO JUDGMENT AT THIS TIME. DEFT STAYS IN THE PREM. UNTIL 8/2/97 5PM. IF DEFT VACATES ON OR BEFORE 8/2/97 AT 5PM, PLTF, WAIVES CURRENT RENT DUE AND ALL BACK RENTS UP TO 8/2/97. IF NOT, PLTF. ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT FOR POSS. OF THE PREM. AS WELL AS BACK RENTS BY EX-PARTE DECLARATION TO COURT. IF DEFT VACATES, WILL DISM CASE SHORTLY AFTER DEFT VACATES.
